title: Cross-Platform Distribution of Augx Extension Modules
author: AI Agent
epic: Augx Core - Cross-Platform AI Tool Interoperability

newCommands.name: export
newCommands.description: Aggregate linked Augx modules into the native rule format of the target AI tool.

addedFlags.description: Mirror the linked module into the named tool(s) via symlink (preferred) or copy (fallback).

addedKeys.description: Tracking record of materialized per-tool artifact paths keyed by module ID. Used by augx unlink for cleanup.

safety.generatedFileMarker: <!-- GENERATED BY augx export - DO NOT EDIT -->

outOfScope: Importing rules from other tools back into Augx modules.
Two-way synchronization between modules and tool-specific files.
Embedding Beads task data into static rule files.
acceptanceCriteria: augx link <module> --mirror cursor,windsurf records materialized paths in coordination.json.
augx unlink <module> removes every previously mirrored artifact for that module.
augx export --target claude-code produces CLAUDE.md with banner, per-module headers, and source hash.
augx export --target all --dry-run reports paths and byte counts without writing.
Re-running augx export with no changes is byte-identical (idempotent).
Exported files reference the Beads MCP server when configured; no static task data is embedded.
Existing .augment/, augx show, augx list, and augx init behavior is unchanged.
Unit tests cover symlink fallback, idempotent re-link, stale-artifact pruning, drift detection, and --dry-run.
Integration tests verify Claude Code and Cursor parse generated files.
